title: Recognise and respond to fire emergencies on a composting site
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recognise and respond to fire emergencies on a composting site demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Recognise a fire risk and undertake preventative actions

pcs.text: Obtain and clarify procedures for first response to fire
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and clarify procedures for first response to fire?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and clarify procedures for first response to fire.

pcs.text: Identify location of firefighting equipment, and check to ensure all equipment is available and ready for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location of firefighting equipment, and check to ensure all equipment is available and ready for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location of firefighting equipment, and check to ensure all equipment is available and ready for use.

pcs.text: Recognise and report conditions that lead to fire and signs of fire
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report conditions that lead to fire and signs of fire?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report conditions that lead to fire and signs of fire.

pcs.text: Observe enterprise procedures for emergencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe enterprise procedures for emergencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe enterprise procedures for emergencies.

pcs.text: Implement temperature and moisture management procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement temperature and moisture management procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement temperature and moisture management procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure immediate area of the emergency.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove machinery and equipment from area when safe to do so.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and set up firefighting equipment according to fire brigade personnel directions.
